input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite supports YAML, JSON, TOML, and HOCON through separate optional modules; generated tests should not choose those formats unless they intentionally add the matching Hoplite module. Core itself can still be meaningfully tested with MapPropertySource or built-in .properties support.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Hoplite core resolves with only Kotlin reflection/stdlib and coroutines dependencies, and its core usage is in-process configuration binding using MapPropertySource, built-in properties parsing, system properties, or environment variables. No Docker service, extra Maven dependency, or required environment/system property is needed before meaningful coverage is reachable.
